command: The fix surface is already known. Keep the patch within crates/core/flags/hiargs.rs, crates/ignore/src/dir.rs, crates/ignore/src/walk.rs, and tests/regression.rs unless there is a compelling reason not to. Make the minimal patch now. Use yoyo change for the edit if available. Do at most 2 confirming reads before the first edit. Avoid unrelated refactors.
Run the exact regression test command and report whether the patch stayed scoped.
